art_market.summary: Global art market expanded by 4% in 2025 to $59.6 billion; U.S. auction sales surged 23%. Current focus is on quality and provenance with strong digital engagement.
notable_news: Global art market growth of 4% in 2025
U.S. auction sales saw a 23% year-over-year increase
Strong focus on quality and provenance by collectors

stock_market.summary: Significant volatility driven by Middle East geopolitical tensions and inflation; Oil prices surged 53%. Investors rotating from large-cap tech to energy and defensive sectors.
